inputs.label: Material Weight
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of raw materials used in the product, including all components and packaging.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of raw materials used in the product, including all components and packaging.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Primary material category to determine emission factors per ISO 14067.

businessContext_i18n.en: Primary material category to determine emission factors per ISO 14067.

inputs.label: Energy Consumption in Manufacturing
inputs.businessContext: Total electrical energy used during production processes (machining, assembly, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total electrical energy used during production processes (machining, assembly, etc.).

inputs.label: Transport Distance
inputs.businessContext: Average distance from raw material source to manufacturing facility, and from facility to customer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average distance from raw material source to manufacturing facility, and from facility to customer.

inputs.label: Transport Mode
inputs.businessContext: Mode of transport affecting emission factors per ton-km (WERC guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Mode of transport affecting emission factors per ton-km (WERC guidelines).

inputs.label: Recycled Content
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of recycled material in the product, reducing virgin material emissions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of recycled material in the product, reducing virgin material emissions.

inputs.label: Use Phase Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Annual energy consumption of the product during its use phase (e.g., for appliances).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual energy consumption of the product during its use phase (e.g., for appliances).

inputs.label: Product Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the product, used to allocate use-phase emissions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected useful life of the product, used to allocate use-phase emissions.

inputs.label: End-of-Life Recycling Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of product mass that is recycled at end of life, reducing disposal emissions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of product mass that is recycled at end of life, reducing disposal emissions.

inputs.label: Energy Source
inputs.businessContext: Type of energy used in manufacturing, affecting emission factor per kWh.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of energy used in manufacturing, affecting emission factor per kWh.

rules.message: Material weight must be greater than zero.
Recycled content must be between 0% and 100%.
Air transport distance exceeds typical threshold; consider alternative modes.
High coal-based energy consumption; recommend switching to renewable sources.

thresholds.message: Total carbon footprint exceeds 5000 kg CO2e. Investigate reduction opportunities.
Material emissions exceed 3000 kg CO2e. Consider material substitution or increased recycled content.
Transport emissions exceed 1000 kg CO2e. Optimize logistics or switch to lower-emission modes.

formulas.description: Emissions from raw material extraction and processing, adjusted for recycled content.
Emissions from energy used in manufacturing processes.
Emissions from transporting raw materials and finished goods.
Emissions from energy consumed during the product's use phase over its lifespan.
Net emissions from end-of-life treatment, considering recycling credits.
Primary result: total product carbon footprint across all life cycle stages.

primary.label: Total Product Carbon Footprint
primary.description: Sum of all life cycle stage emissions.

material_emissions.label: Material Emissions
material_emissions.description: Emissions from raw material extraction and processing.

manufacturing_emissions.label: Manufacturing Emissions
manufacturing_emissions.description: Emissions from energy used in production.

transport_emissions.label: Transport Emissions
transport_emissions.description: Emissions from transportation of materials and products.

use_phase_emissions.label: Use Phase Emissions
use_phase_emissions.description: Emissions from product energy consumption during use.

end_of_life_emissions.label: End-of-Life Emissions
end_of_life_emissions.description: Net emissions from disposal and recycling.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Material Emission Factor
hiddenLossDrivers.description: The selected material type has a high emission factor per kg. Consider alternative materials.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Low Recycled Content
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Recycled content is below 30%, increasing virgin material emissions.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inefficient Transport Mode
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Air transport has a high emission factor per ton-km. Use rail or ship if possible.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Use Phase Energy
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Annual energy consumption is above average for this product category.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Recycled Content
suggestedActions.description: Raise recycled content to at least 50% to reduce material emissions by up to 40%.

suggestedActions.label: Switch to Renewable Energy
suggestedActions.description: Replace coal or grid energy with solar or wind to cut manufacturing emissions by 80%.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Transport Logistics
suggestedActions.description: Consolidate shipments and switch from air to rail or ship to reduce transport emissions.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Use Phase Efficiency
suggestedActions.description: Redesign product to reduce annual energy consumption by 20% through better insulation or electronics.

suggestedActions.label: Enhance End-of-Life Recycling
suggestedActions.description: Design for disassembly and partner with recyclers to achieve 80% recycling rate.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Footprint
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total footprint adjusted by a confidence factor (0.8 to 1.2) based on data quality and completeness.
